channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Exact Unlearning in Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Researchers propose reinforcement learning algorithm for exact data unlearning with computational cost only a fraction of retraining from scratch.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dual Advantage Fields
item.description: Dual Advantage Fields is a policy extraction method for offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning that scores actions by their alignment with goal directions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Metric-Aware Hybrid Forecasting for the CTF4Science Lorenz Challenge
item.description: A hybrid approach combining multiple prediction techniques for different metrics achieved strong performance on the CTF4Science Lorenz forecasting benchmark.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Training-Free Lexical-Dense Fusion for Conversational-Memory Retrieval
item.description: Training-free fusion of dense and lexical retrieval improves conversational memory retrieval by 8.8-17.2 Hit@1 points over dense-only approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Geometric View of Counterfactual Behavior: Interaction of Boundary Proximity and Local Support
item.description: Counterfactual behavior in ML models varies by decision boundary placement and local data support, independent of predictive performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Edge of Stability Selectively Shapes Learning Across the Data Distribution
item.description: Edge of stability selectively redistributes learning across data groups, benefiting those with gradient alignment and sustained gradient magnitude.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Recover-LoRA for Aggressive Quantization: Reclaiming Accuracy in 2-Bit Language Models via Low-Rank Adaptation with Knowledge Distillation on Synthetic Data
item.description: Recover-LoRA restores accuracy in 2-bit quantized language models through selective mixed-precision and low-rank adaptation with synthetic data distillation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RL Excursions during Pre-Training: Re-examining Policy Optimization for LLM training
item.description: Study shows applying RL during pre-training matches or exceeds post-training RL, with pre-training data composition more important than model scale for effectiveness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Ticks to Flows: Dynamics of Neural Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Environments
item.description: Theoretical framework characterizes deep actor-critic RL in continuous environments using continuous-time stochastic processes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Derivative Informed Learning of Exchange-Correlation Functionals
item.description: Derivative-informed loss training improves machine-learned exchange-correlation functionals' energy prediction accuracy by 66%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Loss Is Not Enough: Sampling Conditions and Inductive Bias in Contrastive Representation Learning
item.description: Theoretical framework shows contrastive learning recovers latent geometry when sampling satisfies diversity condition, with inductive bias becoming more critical when diversity is limited.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Reward Models Learn Interpretable and Specialized Experts for Personalized Preference Modeling
item.description: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts reward models learn specialized, interpretable experts for personalized human preference modeling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scaling Novel Graph Generation via Lightweight Structure-Guided Autoregressive Models
item.description: Autoregressive graph generation model uses structure-guided topological ordering to achieve near log-linear complexity while improving novelty and validity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PE-MHL: Physics-Encoded Modular Hybrid Layers for Scalable Learning of Complex Systems
item.description: PE-MHL combines physics-based and data-driven components with theoretical convergence guarantees, outperforming monolithic networks in accuracy and generalization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Offline-to-Online Learning in Linear Bandits
item.description: Linear bandit algorithm balances offline-to-online learning by using offline data early and favoring exploration as horizon grows.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Folded Transport MCMC: Certifiable Quotient Posterior Computation for Symmetric Bayesian Models
item.description: Folded Transport MCMC samples quotient posteriors to resolve redundant multimodality from label permutations in symmetric Bayesian models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Latent Anchor-Driven Test Generation for Deep Neural Networks
item.description: Latte, a black-box testing framework, generates diverse test cases in latent space to improve fault detection in deep neural networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Testing Neural Networks via Bayesian-Guided Exploration of Decision Landscapes
item.description: BayesWarp tests neural networks using saliency-guided mutations and Bayesian optimization to discover diverse failures while maintaining proximity to original data distribution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OpenRFM: Dissecting Relational In-Context Learning
item.description: OpenRFM improves relational foundation models for database in-context learning by addressing label sparsity and pre-training gaps, achieving 30% performance gains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Galerkin Normalizing Flows for Bayesian Inference of Diffusions with Inaccessible Boundaries
item.description: Neural Galerkin normalizing flows learn diffusion transition densities for Bayesian inference in models with inaccessible boundaries.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Measuring What Matters: Synthetic Benchmarks for Concept Bottleneck Models
item.description: Researchers create synthetic benchmarks for concept bottleneck models to evaluate their performance and diagnose failures in decision support and automation tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Geometric Characterization of the Stationary Plateau for Two-Layer Neural Networks
item.description: Analysis characterizes stationary plateaus in two-layer neural networks created by neuron splitting, determining when they are minima or saddle points.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Policy Gradient for Continuous-Time Robust Markov Decision Processes
item.description: Continuous-time policy gradient algorithms for robust MDPs achieve linear convergence with improved sample efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Learning for Multi-Center Sepsis Early Prediction with Privacy-Preserving
item.description: Federated learning enables accurate sepsis prediction across three hospitals without centralizing patient data or compromising privacy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Literature-Guided Minimax Optimization of Virtual Epilepsy Neurostimulation
item.description: Minimax optimization framework improves epilepsy neurostimulation robustness 39.8% by prioritizing worst-case patient outcomes over average responses in parameter search.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Expectations vs. Realities: The Cost of MSE-Optimal Forecasting Under Conditional Uncertainty
item.description: Study reveals MSE-optimal forecasting sacrifices marginal realism; relaxing accuracy by 5% yields median 17.3% realism improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MeshTok: Efficient Multi-Scale Tokenization for Scalable PDE Transformers
item.description: MeshTok applies adaptive mesh refinement to Transformer tokenization, improving computational efficiency for multi-scale PDE modeling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Do Fewer Coordinates Suffice in DP-SGD?
item.description: TP-TopK uses private warm-up to identify important coordinates for sparse DP-SGD training, reducing noise scaling from full to active parameter dimensions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Symbolic to Geometric: Enabling Spatial Reasoning in Large Language Models
item.description: Spatial Language Model enables true geometric spatial reasoning in LLMs using learned spatial representations as first-class modality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Revisiting Privacy Amplification by Subsampling in Selective Release DPSGD
item.description: DPSR-CG corrects privacy accounting errors in selective release DPSGD, achieving strong privacy guarantees with improved model utility and convergence speed.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Epidemiology of Model Collapse: Modeling Synthetic Data Contamination via Bilayer SIR Dynamics
item.description: Bilayer SIR epidemiological model reveals cross-contamination of synthetic data in AI ecosystem exhibits supercritical dynamics; synthetic text detection offers highest-leverage mitigation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Predict and Reconstruct: Joint Objectives for Self-Supervised Language Representation Learning
item.description: Hybrid pre-training combines JEPA prediction and masked language modeling, producing more uniform, semantically-focused embeddings than pure MLM baseline.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Improving Heart-Focused Medical Question Answering in LLMs via Variance-Aware Rubric Rewards with GRPO
item.description: Variance-aware rubric rewards enable GRPO post-training to significantly improve heart-focused medical question answering in smaller language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Generic Triple-Latent Compression with Gated Associative Retrieval
item.description: Triple-latent sequence models with compressed memory improve language modeling on WikiText-2 and MiniMind benchmarks with gated associative retrieval.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PEFT of SLM for Telecommunications Customer Support: A Comparative Study of LoRA Configurations with Energy Consumption Analysis
item.description: Comparative study of LoRA configurations for telecom customer support shows models with lowest validation loss rank poorly in human evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MCBench: A Multicontext Safety Assessment Benchmark for Omni Large Language Models
item.description: MCBench, a safety benchmark for multimodal LLMs, reveals that current models lack robust cross-modal reasoning for safety-critical assessments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Efficient Punctuation Restoration via Weighted Lookahead Scoring Method for Streaming ASR Systems
item.description: Non-autoregressive scoring method with bounded lookahead enables efficient punctuation restoration in streaming ASR, achieving 0.937 F1 score on IWSLT 2017.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Scoring to Explanations: Evaluating SHAP and LLM Rationales for Rubric-based Teaching Quality Assessment
item.description: Framework combining SHAP and LLM rationales for rubric-based scoring shows SHAP provides more faithful explanations than LLM-generated rationales for teaching quality assessment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-Granularity Reasoning for Natural Language Inference
item.description: Multi-Granularity Reasoning Network improves natural language inference by leveraging hierarchical semantic features across multiple representation levels.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LANTERN: Layered Archival and Temporal Episodic Retrieval Network for Long-Context LLM Conversations
item.description: LANTERN archives conversation history and recovers 78.3% of facts lost during context compaction using hybrid retrieval without additional LLM calls.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Granularity Gap: A Multi-Dimensional Longitudinal Audit of Sycophancy in Gemini Models
item.description: The Granularity Gap: A Multi-Dimensional Longitudinal Audit of Sycophancy in Gemini Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LoRi: Low-Rank Distillation for Implicit Reasoning
item.description: LoRi: Low-Rank Distillation for Implicit Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Model of Multi-turn Human Persuadability Using Probabilistic Belief Tracing
item.description: A Model of Multi-turn Human Persuadability Using Probabilistic Belief Tracing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-supervised User Profile Generation for Personalization
item.description: Self-supervised User Profile Generation for Personalization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Trajectory Dynamics in Language Model Hidden States Predict Human Processing Costs Beyond Surprisal
item.description: Trajectory Dynamics in Language Model Hidden States Predict Human Processing Costs Beyond Surprisal

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ReasoningFlow: Discourse Structures for Understanding LLM Reasoning Traces
item.description: ReasoningFlow: Discourse Structures for Understanding LLM Reasoning Traces

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Evidence is Sparse: Weakly Supervised Early Failure Alerting in Dialogs and LLM-Agent Trajectories
item.description: When Evidence is Sparse: Weakly Supervised Early Failure Alerting in Dialogs and LLM-Agent Trajectories

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Executable Schema Contracts: From Automatic Ingestion to Multi-Source Retrieval
item.description: Executable Schema Contracts: From Automatic Ingestion to Multi-Source Retrieval

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ComplexityMT: Benchmarking the Interaction Between Text Complexity and Machine Translation
item.description: ComplexityMT: Benchmarking the Interaction Between Text Complexity and Machine Translation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multilingual Coreference Resolution via Cycle-Consistent Machine Translation
item.description: Multilingual Coreference Resolution via Cycle-Consistent Machine Translation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Localizing Prompt Ambiguity in Large Language Models with Probe-Targeted Attribution
item.description: Localizing Prompt Ambiguity in Large Language Models with Probe-Targeted Attribution

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MASF: A Multi-Model Adaptive Selection Framework for Abstractive Text summarization
item.description: MASF: A Multi-Model Adaptive Selection Framework for Abstractive Text summarization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CHASE: Adversarial Red-Blue Teaming for Improving LLM Safety using Reinforcement Learning
item.description: CHASE: Adversarial Red-Blue Teaming for Improving LLM Safety using Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multilingual Detection of Alzheimer's Disease from Speech: A Cross-Linguistic Transfer Learning Approach
item.description: Multilingual Detection of Alzheimer's Disease from Speech: A Cross-Linguistic Transfer Learning Approach

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
item.description: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AURA: Intent-Directed Probing for Implicit-Need Surfacing in Situated LLM Agents
item.description: AURA: Intent-Directed Probing for Implicit-Need Surfacing in Situated LLM Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] InfoShield: Privacy-Preserving Speech Representations for Mental Health Screening via Information-Theoretic Optimization
item.description: InfoShield: Privacy-Preserving Speech Representations for Mental Health Screening via Information-Theoretic Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Using Large Language Models to Support High Volume Application Review for an Undergraduate Research Program
item.description: Using Large Language Models to Support High Volume Application Review for an Undergraduate Research Program

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Domain-Aware Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis Using Language-Specific Statistical Graphs
item.description: Domain-Aware Mispronunciation Detection and Diagnosis Using Language-Specific Statistical Graphs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TensorBench: Benchmarking Coding Agents on a Compiler-Based Tensor Framework
item.description: TensorBench: Benchmarking Coding Agents on a Compiler-Based Tensor Framework
